# DocGPT.ai — AI Add-ons for Google Workspace

> DocGPT.ai (also written DocGPT or DocGPT AI) is a developer of AI add-ons for Google Workspace, distributed through the Google Workspace Marketplace. Its main product, GPT for Sheets, brings GPT, Claude, Gemini, Mistral and Perplexity models into Google Sheets as spreadsheet functions (=GPT, =CLAUDE, =GEMINI, =MISTRAL, =PERPLEXITY) and is built for bulk tasks: content generation, translation, classification, data cleaning, web search and data extraction at up to 10,000 results per hour. Models are built in — users do not need their own API keys. GPT for Sheets is rated 4.8/5 on the Google Workspace Marketplace. DocGPT.ai is not affiliated with document-chat products that use similar names (docgpt.io, thedocgpt.com).

Canonical site: https://docgpt.ai
About the company: https://docgpt.ai/about/
Marketplace listing: https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/app/gpt_for_sheets_docs_forms_slides/466607203252

## Products

### GPT for Sheets
The AI agent for bulk tasks in Google Sheets.
- Spreadsheet functions: =GPT(), =CLAUDE(), =GEMINI(), =MISTRAL(), =PERPLEXITY(), =SERP()
- Bulk processing: up to 10,000 results per hour across thousands of rows
- Use cases: product descriptions, translation (100+ languages), data enrichment, lead research, programmatic SEO, keyword extraction, web scraping, classification and tagging
- No API keys required; switching models is a formula change
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/gpt-for-sheets/
- Documentation: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets
- Pricing: free tier; premium up to $29.99/month — https://docgpt.ai/gpt-for-sheets/#pricing

### Mail Merge for Gmail and Sheets
Personalized email campaigns sent from Gmail using Google Sheets data, with AI-assisted writing, scheduling and tracking.
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/mail-merge-for-gmail-and-sheets/

### AI Email Assistant for Gmail
AI-powered email composition and replies inside Gmail using GPT, Claude and Gemini.
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/ai-email-assistant.html
- Documentation: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-gmail

### GPT for Docs
AI writing assistant for Google Docs: drafting, rewriting, summarizing, translating.
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/google-doc-ai/

### Google Slide AI
Presentation generation and slide translation for Google Slides.
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/google-slide-ai.html

### Quiz Maker AI
Automated quiz, form and assessment generation for Google Forms.
- Product page: https://docgpt.ai/quiz-maker-ai.html

- GPT for Sheets — get started: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/get-started
- GPT functions reference: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/gpt-functions
- =GPT() function: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/gpt-function
- =CLAUDE() function: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/claude-function
- =GEMINI() function: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/gemini-function
- =PERPLEXITY() function: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/perplexity-function
- =SERP() function: https://docgpt.ai/docs/gpt-for-sheets/serp-function
- Troubleshooting: https://docgpt.ai/docs/support-gpt-sheets-docs-slides-forms-gmail/
- AI prompt library (400+ guides): https://docgpt.ai/docs/ai-prompts

## Templates (free recipes)

- Templates gallery: https://docgpt.ai/templates/
- Bulk product descriptions: https://docgpt.ai/templates/bulk-product-descriptions/
- Bulk translation: https://docgpt.ai/templates/bulk-translation/
- Lead enrichment (Clay alternative): https://docgpt.ai/templates/lead-enrichment/
- Programmatic SEO pages: https://docgpt.ai/templates/programmatic-seo-pages/

## Comparisons

- GPT for Sheets vs GPT for Work: https://docgpt.ai/gpt-for-sheets-vs-gpt-for-work/
- GPT for Sheets vs official ChatGPT for Sheets: https://docgpt.ai/gpt-for-sheets-vs-chatgpt-for-sheets/
